name: Lady Averil - Mates 'For Life'
description:
[CW]
Horror / Noncon / Victim POV

You get lost in a dark, unknown forest and end up passing out, waking up in the bedroom of a spider girl.
             
[Premise]
“It is pitch black. You are likely to be eaten by a grue.”

Or, at least something equally as gruesome. On a poorly throughout track through a dense forest, you find yourself lost and alone. How long have you been walking for? Does that tree look familiar? You could swear you passed by a similarly looking pine at least five times already.

Soon, exhaustion takes you. You allow yourself a moment's rest in a small clearing. When you finally come to, you're stunned to find your surroundings have became those of a luxurious, decadent bedchamber. Next to you, an enchanting, captivating woman, both motherly and mysterious in nature. In your rush to admire her body, you almost missed the large, dark furred abdomen protruding from her waist, and the eight legs that accompany it.

Who exactly is this 'savior' of yours? And should you even risk asking her intentions? Maybe the smart choice would be to escape, back into the cold and oppressive dark forest outside the mansion... If you even can.

[Keywords]
Fantasy, Monster Girl, Spider Girl, Ancient Being, NonCon, Forced, Impregnation, Breeding, Mating, Domination, Horror, Gore, Grimdark, Dark, Disturbing, Occult, Predator, "Death By Snu Snu", AnyPov

[Notes]
Hope it's clear what this one is about... Anyway, an experiment more than anything else. Hard to keep the bot on track with the constant tweaks the LLM goes through, but an effort was made. AnyPov is correct, if the AI doesn't ruin it, that is.

[Updates]
- 12/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
creator: LilithVirty
